member.name: T:UitkForKsp2.MVVM.Commands.ICommand`1
member.summary: Generic command that receives a parameter of type T. T can be a UI event type (e.g. KeyDownEvent) or a value type extracted from ChangeEvent<T> by EventBinding.

member.name: T:UitkForKsp2.MVVM.Commands.RelayCommand`1
member.summary: Concrete parameterized command backed by delegates. T is typically a UI event type or a value extracted from ChangeEvent<T>.

member.name: T:UitkForKsp2.MVVM.Commands.RelayCommand
member.summary: Concrete parameterless command backed by delegates.

member.name: T:UitkForKsp2.MVVM.Commands.ICommand
member.summary: Parameterless command interface. Use for actions where no event data is needed: button clicks, pointer enter/leave, focus/blur, submit, etc.

member.name: T:UitkForKsp2.MVVM.Bindings.EventBinding
member.summary:
Binds any UI Toolkit event on any VisualElement to an ICommand or ICommand<TEvent> on the data source. Works with every EventBase subclass - clicks, pointer, keyboard, focus, change, drag, navigation, and more.
UXML usage:
<!-- Parameterless: event fires command, data discarded --> <EventBinding property="name" data-source-path="HoverCommand" event-type="PointerEnterEvent" />
<!-- Typed: ViewModel receives full event object --> <EventBinding property="value" data-source-path="KeyDownCommand" event-type="KeyDownEvent" />
<!-- ChangeEvent special case: extracts newValue automatically --> <EventBinding property="value" data-source-path="VolumeCommand" event-type="ChangeEvent<System.Single>" />
The "property" attribute is required by the infrastructure but unused - set it to any valid property (e.g. "name"). Reflection runs only once per command instance - subsequent updates only sync enabled state.

member.name: P:UitkForKsp2.MVVM.Bindings.EventBinding.DataSourcePath
member.summary: Path to the ICommand property on the data source, e.g. "VolumeChangedCommand".

member.name: P:UitkForKsp2.MVVM.Bindings.EventBinding.EventType
member.summary: UI Toolkit event class name. E.g. "ClickEvent", "KeyDownEvent", "ChangeEvent<System.Single>".

member.name: T:UitkForKsp2.MVVM.Bindings.EventTypeResolver
member.summary: Resolves event type name strings from UXML attributes to System.Type objects. Supports simple names ("KeyDownEvent") and generic names ("ChangeEvent<System.Single>"). Results are cached so reflection runs only once per unique type string.

member.name: T:UitkForKsp2.MVVM.Bindings.CommandBinding
member.summary:
Convenience binding for Button.clicked -> ICommand. Wires the button's clicked event and enable state to a parameterless command on the data source.
UXML usage:
<ui:Button name="buy-btn" text="Buy"> <Bindings> <CommandBinding property="text" data-source-path="BuyCommand" /> </Bindings> </ui:Button>
The "property" attribute is required by the infrastructure but unused - set it to any valid property (by convention "name"). For non-Button elements, use EventBinding.

member.name: P:UitkForKsp2.MVVM.Bindings.CommandBinding.DataSourcePath
member.summary: Path to the ICommand property on the data source, e.g. "BuyCommand".

member.name: T:UitkForKsp2.MVVM.Core.ViewModelBase
member.summary: Optional base class for ViewModels. Provides SetField to notify the binding system on change, eliminating per-property boilerplate. ViewModels only need to inherit this, not INotifyBindablePropertyChanged directly.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.MVVM.Core.ViewModelBase.SetField``1(``0@,``0,System.String)
member.summary: Sets a backing field and notifies the binding system if the value changed. Uses [CallerMemberName], never pass the property name manually. Returns true if the value changed.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.MVVM.Core.ViewModelBase.Notify(System.String)
member.summary: Manually raises propertyChanged for computed or derived properties.

member.name: T:UitkForKsp2.API.Manipulator.HideManipulator
member.summary: Allows hiding a VisualElement with the F2 key.

member.name: P:UitkForKsp2.API.Manipulator.HideManipulator.target
member.summary: The target element that will be hidden.

member.name: T:UitkForKsp2.API.Manipulator.DragManipulator
member.summary: A manipulator to make UI Toolkit elements draggable within the screen bounds.

member.name: P:UitkForKsp2.API.Manipulator.DragManipulator.IsDragging
member.summary: Indicates whether the element is currently being dragged.

member.name: P:UitkForKsp2.API.Manipulator.DragManipulator.IsEnabled
member.summary: Enables or disables the dragging functionality.

member.name: P:UitkForKsp2.API.Manipulator.DragManipulator.AllowDraggingOffScreen
member.summary: Indicates whether the element can be dragged off screen.

member.name: P:UitkForKsp2.API.Manipulator.DragManipulator.target
member.summary: The target element that will be made draggable.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Manipulator.DragManipulator.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Manipulator.DragManipulator.OnPointerDown(UnityEngine.UIElements.PointerDownEvent)
member.summary: Handles the initiation of the dragging process.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Manipulator.DragManipulator.OnPointerMove(UnityEngine.UIElements.PointerMoveEvent)
member.summary: Handles the movement of the draggable element.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Manipulator.DragManipulator.OnPointerUp(UnityEngine.UIElements.PointerUpEvent)
member.summary: Handles the end of the dragging process.

member.name: T:UitkForKsp2.API.Manipulator.OrderManipulator
member.summary: Allows bringing a UITK panel to the front when clicked.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Manipulator.OrderManipulator.#ctor(UnityEngine.UIElements.PanelSettings)
member.summary: Creates a new instance for the given panel.
member.param: The panel to manage the order for.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Manipulator.OrderManipulator.RegisterCallbacksOnTarget
member.summary: Registers the necessary callbacks on the target element.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Manipulator.OrderManipulator.UnregisterCallbacksFromTarget
member.summary: Unregisters the callbacks from the target element.

member.name: T:UitkForKsp2.API.Window
member.summary: Contains methods for creating UIDocument windows.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Window.Create(UitkForKsp2.API.WindowOptions,UnityEngine.UIElements.VisualElement)
member.summary: Creates an empty UIDocument.
member.param: Root element of the UIDocument. If null, a new empty VisualElement is created.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Window.Create(UitkForKsp2.API.WindowOptions,UnityEngine.UIElements.VisualTreeAsset)
member.summary: Creates a new UIDocument from a UXML asset.
member.returns: UIDocument with the UI defined in UXML.

member.name: T:UitkForKsp2.API.Order.OrderManager
member.summary: Provides functionality to manage and maintain the sorting order of PanelSettings instances, allowing them to be registered, brought to the front, and unregistered.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Order.OrderManager.Register(UnityEngine.UIElements.PanelSettings)
member.summary: Registers a PanelSettings instance to the SortManager.
member.param: The PanelSettings instance to register. If null, no action is taken.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Order.OrderManager.Register(UnityEngine.Canvas)
member.summary: Registers a Canvas instance to the SortManager.
member.param: The Canvas instance to register. If null, or if it is already registered, no action is taken.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Order.OrderManager.BringToFront(UnityEngine.UIElements.PanelSettings)
member.summary: Brings a registered PanelSettings instance to the front by assigning it the highest sorting order.
member.param: The PanelSettings instance to bring to the front. If null or not registered, no action is taken.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Order.OrderManager.BringToFront(UnityEngine.Canvas)
member.summary: Brings a registered Canvas instance to the front by assigning it the highest sorting order.
member.param: The Canvas instance to bring to the front. If null or not registered, no action is taken.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Order.OrderManager.Unregister(UnityEngine.UIElements.PanelSettings)
member.summary: Unregisters a PanelSettings instance from the SortManager.
member.param: The PanelSettings instance to unregister. If null or not registered, no action is taken.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Order.OrderManager.Unregister(UnityEngine.Canvas)
member.summary: Unregisters a Canvas instance from the SortManager.
member.param: The Canvas instance to unregister. If null or not registered, no action is taken.

member.name: T:UitkForKsp2.API.MoveOptions
member.summary: Options for allowing an element to be dragged.

member.name: P:UitkForKsp2.API.MoveOptions.IsMovingEnabled
member.summary: Should the element be moved by dragging?

member.name: P:UitkForKsp2.API.MoveOptions.CheckScreenBounds
member.summary: Should the element be moved only within the screen bounds?

member.name: P:UitkForKsp2.API.MoveOptions.Default
member.summary: Default options for dragging an element.

member.name: T:UitkForKsp2.API.Extensions
member.summary: Extension methods for UIDocument and VisualElements.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Extensions.EnableLocalization(UnityEngine.UIElements.UIDocument)
member.summary: Automatically localize elements in a document. Only elements with a string property "text" whose value is a localization key starting with '#' will be localized.
member.param: The document in which to localize all localizable elements.
member.returns: The DocumentLocalization component which was added to the document.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Extensions.EnableUiSounds(UnityEngine.UIElements.UIDocument)
member.summary: Enable delegated UI sounds for elements marked with sound USS classes.
member.param: The document whose root element should listen for UI sound events.
member.returns: The document with delegated UI sounds enabled.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Extensions.Show(UnityEngine.UIElements.UIDocument)
member.summary: Show a UIDocument by setting its root VisualElement's display style to DisplayStyle.Flex.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Extensions.Hide(UnityEngine.UIElements.UIDocument)
member.summary: Hide a UIDocument by setting its root VisualElement's display style to DisplayStyle.None.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Extensions.ToggleDisplay(UnityEngine.UIElements.UIDocument)
member.summary: Toggle the display of a UIDocument between DisplayStyle.Flex and DisplayStyle.None.
member.param: The document to toggle the display of.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Extensions.Set``1(``0,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Set a property on a VisualElement.
member.param: The element on which to set the property.
The name of the property to set.
The value to set the property to.
member.typeparam: The type of the element which must be a subclass of VisualElement.
member.returns: The element on which the property was set.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Extensions.Text``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Set the text of a TextElement.
member.param: The element on which to set the text property.
member.typeparam: The type of the element which must be a subclass of TextElement.
member.returns: The element on which the text property was set.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Extensions.AddChildren``1(``0,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{UnityEngine.UIElements.VisualElement})
member.summary: Add children to a VisualElement.
member.param: The element to which to add the children.
member.typeparam: The type of the parent element which must be a subclass of VisualElement.
member.returns: The parent element to which the children were added.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Extensions.Show``1(``0)
member.summary: Show a VisualElement by setting its display style to DisplayStyle.Flex.
member.typeparam: The type of the element which must be a subclass of VisualElement.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Extensions.Hide``1(``0)
member.summary: Hide a VisualElement by setting its display style to DisplayStyle.None.
member.typeparam: The type of the element which must be a subclass of VisualElement.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Extensions.ToggleDisplay``1(``0)
member.summary: Toggle the display of a VisualElement between DisplayStyle.Flex and DisplayStyle.None.
member.param: The element to toggle the display of.
member.typeparam: The type of the element which must be a subclass of VisualElement.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Extensions.MakeDraggable``1(``0,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Make a VisualElement draggable by adding a DragManipulator.
member.param: Should the element be draggable only within the screen bounds?
member.typeparam: The type of the element which must be a subclass of VisualElement.
member.returns: The element which was made draggable.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Extensions.MakeDraggable``1(``0)
member.summary: Make a VisualElement draggable by adding a DragManipulator.
member.typeparam: The type of the element which must be a subclass of VisualElement.
member.returns: The element which was made draggable.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Extensions.EnableHiding``1(``0)
member.summary: Enables the F2 hiding functionality for a visual element.
member.param: The visual element to enable hiding for.
member.typeparam: The type of the visual element.
member.returns: The visual element with the hiding functionality enabled.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Extensions.EnableUiSounds``1(``0)
member.summary: Enable delegated UI sounds for child elements marked with sound USS classes.
member.param: The root element that should listen for child sound events.
member.typeparam: The type of the root visual element.
member.returns: The root element with delegated UI sounds enabled.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Extensions.SetDefaultPosition(UnityEngine.UIElements.VisualElement,System.Func{UnityEngine.Vector2,UnityEngine.Vector2})
member.summary: Set the default position of an element using a callback to calculate the position.
member.param: The callback which will be called when the element is resized. The callback will be passed the size of the element and should return the position to set the element to in the reference resolution.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Extensions.CenterByDefault(UnityEngine.UIElements.VisualElement)
member.summary: Set the default position of an element to the center of the screen.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Extensions.DisableDragging(UnityEngine.UIElements.VisualElement)
member.summary: Disable dragging on a specific element.
member.param: The element to disable dragging on.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Extensions.DisableGameInputOnFocus(UnityEngine.UIElements.VisualElement)
member.summary: Disable game input when an element is focused.
member.param: The element to disable game input on focus for.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Extensions.Log(System.String)
member.summary: Log a message to the console only in debug builds.

member.name: F:UitkForKsp2.API.Extensions._inputStatuses
member.summary: The statuses of all input definitions before they were disabled.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Extensions.SetGameInputDisabled(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disable or enable the game input.
member.param: True to disable the game input, false to enable it.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Extensions.GeometryChangedHandler(UnityEngine.UIElements.GeometryChangedEvent,UnityEngine.UIElements.VisualElement,System.Func{UnityEngine.Vector2,UnityEngine.Vector2},UnityEngine.UIElements.EventCallback{UnityEngine.UIElements.GeometryChangedEvent})
member.summary: Callback to recalculate element position when the geometry of an element changes.
member.param: The callback to calculate the position.

member.name: T:UitkForKsp2.API.ReferenceResolution
member.summary: Reference resolution for UI elements. All UI elements should be designed for this resolution, they will automatically scale to the user's real resolution.

member.name: F:UitkForKsp2.API.ReferenceResolution.Width
member.summary: The width of the reference resolution.

member.name: F:UitkForKsp2.API.ReferenceResolution.Height
member.summary: The height of the reference resolution.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.ReferenceResolution.ConvertFromScreenPercentage(UnityEngine.Vector2)
member.summary: Converts percentage of screen width and height to reference resolution pixels.
member.param: Vector with width and height in percentage of screen size.
member.returns: Vector with corresponding width and height in the reference resolution.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.ReferenceResolution.ConvertFromScreenPixels(UnityEngine.Vector2)
member.summary: Converts absolute pixels to reference resolution pixels.
member.param: Vector with screen size based width and height in pixels.
member.returns: Vector with corresponding width and height in the reference resolution.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.ReferenceResolution.GetReferenceMousePosition
member.summary: Gets mouse position converted to reference resolution pixels.
member.returns: Mouse position with corresponding x and flipped y in the reference resolution.

member.name: T:UitkForKsp2.API.Localization.LocalizationConverter
member.summary: Global UITK binding converter for translating strings that use the '#Key/Path' convention.

member.name: T:UitkForKsp2.API.WindowOptions
member.summary: Options for creating a window.

member.name: P:UitkForKsp2.API.WindowOptions.WindowId
member.summary: Unique ID for the game object. Autogenerated if null.

member.name: P:UitkForKsp2.API.WindowOptions.Parent
member.summary: Parent game object transform. Uses "UI Manager(Clone)/Main Canvas" if null.

member.name: P:UitkForKsp2.API.WindowOptions.IsHidingEnabled
member.summary: Should window hiding with F2 be enabled?

member.name: P:UitkForKsp2.API.WindowOptions.UseStockScale
member.summary: Should it use the UI scale setting?

member.name: P:UitkForKsp2.API.WindowOptions.DisableGameInputForTextFields
member.summary: Should the game input be disabled when a text field is focused? This will only affect text fields

member.name: P:UitkForKsp2.API.WindowOptions.BringToFrontOnPointerDown
member.summary: Should the window be brought to front when clicked?

member.name: P:UitkForKsp2.API.WindowOptions.MoveOptions
member.summary: Options for moving the window by dragging.

member.name: P:UitkForKsp2.API.WindowOptions.Default
member.summary: Default options for creating a window.

member.name: T:UitkForKsp2.API.Element
member.summary: Contains methods for creating UI elements.

member.summary: Creates a new TextElement-based UI element.

member.summary: Creates a new ListView element.

member.summary: Creates a new IMGUIContainer element.

member.summary: Creates a new Label element.

member.summary: Creates a new Button element.

member.summary: Creates a new Scroller element.

member.summary: Creates a new TextField element.

member.summary: Creates a new Foldout element.

member.name: M:UitkForKsp2.API.Element.Slider(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Single},System.Nullable{System.Single},System.Nullable{System.Single},System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{UnityEngine.UIElements.VisualElement})
member.summary: Creates a new Slider element.
member.param: Slider minimum value with 0 being default.
Slider maximum value with 10 being default.

member.summary: Creates a new SliderInt element.
member.param: SliderInt minimum value with 0 being default.
SliderInt maximum value with 10 being default.

member.summary: Creates a new MinMaxSlider element.

member.summary: Creates a new root VisualElement with default styling.
member.returns: New root VisualElement with default styling.

member.name: T:UitkForKsp2.UitkForKsp2Plugin
member.summary: UITK for KSP 2 main plugin class.

member.name: P:UitkForKsp2.UitkForKsp2Plugin.PanelSettings
member.summary: The default UITK for KSP 2 panel settings with the KerbalUI theme. Do not modify this, as all mods using UITK will be affected. It is also strongly discouraged to create your own instance of the PanelSettings class, as having multiple panels in use will negatively impact performance.

member.name: T:UitkForKsp2.Configuration
member.summary: Configuration class for the UITK for KSP 2 plugin.

member.name: P:UitkForKsp2.Configuration.CurrentScreenWidth
member.summary: The current UITK screen width, taking into account whether automatic UI scaling is enabled.

member.name: P:UitkForKsp2.Configuration.CurrentScreenHeight
member.summary: The current UITK screen height, taking into account whether automatic UI scaling is enabled.

summary.para: A component which automatically localizes all elements in a document. Only elements with a string property "text" whose value is a localization key starting with '#' will be localized.
The LocalizationManager.OnLocalizeEvent is handled to automatically update the localization of all registered elements when the game language is changed.

member.name: M:DocumentLocalization.RegisterElement(UnityEngine.UIElements.VisualElement)
member.summary: Register or update an element to be localized. The element must have a property named "text" of type string, and the value of the property must be a localization key starting with '#'.

member.name: M:DocumentLocalization.RegisterDocument(UnityEngine.UIElements.UIDocument)
member.summary: Register all elements in the document to be localized. Only elements with a string property "text" whose value is a localization key starting with '#' will be registered.
member.param: The document in which to register all localizable elements.

member.name: M:DocumentLocalization.Localize
member.summary: Update the localization of all registered elements.
